headline: Hydrolix engineering leader working on AI, connectors, and high-scale observability data
title: Director of Engineering
confidenceNote: Hydrolix blog, LinkedIn preview, GitHub, and The Org results align on Alok Aggarwal at Hydrolix in Portland. Public title phrasing varies between Director of Engineering and Innovation Lab leadership.
bioMarkdown: Alok is an engineering leader at Hydrolix, where he works on innovation-lab efforts spanning natural-language querying, connectors, and high-scale event-data analytics. He is a strong match for conversations about observability, data infrastructure, AI-assisted analytics, and engineering team leadership.

headline: Co-founder and CEO of Decawork, building autonomous IT admin tooling for enterprises
title: Co-founder & CEO
